subject: Torchic, the Gen 3 fire starter Pokemon, a small orange chick-like creature with a flame crest, standing on a rocky surface
description: A close illustration of Torchic standing upright on what appears to be a stone or rocky surface, with warm reddish-orange ambient lighting behind it. The small round creature has a distinctively orange-yellow body with a flame-like crest on its head and short stubby legs. Its expression reads alert and curious, with large round eyes looking forward. The warm, glowing background reinforces the fire-elemental identity. The composition is simple and creature-focused, with the subject centered and clearly legible against the warm-toned backdrop.
foreground: Torchic standing on rocky ground, flame crest visible on head
